arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid begin search for summer priority amid doubts about starter
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid have on a number of occasions been described as the side with the most depth in La Liga this season, with Diego Simeone having a number of alternatives and differing profiles to call on. Not least La Liga’s second-top scorer last season, Alexander Sorloth, who despite strong form has been kept to a […] The post Atletico Madrid begin search for summer priority amid doubts about starter appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid have hope of resurrecting failed 2024 transfer
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid had a very busy summer transfer window in 2024, with several big-name signings having arrived at the Metropolitano. Conor Gallagher was one of those, although a deal with Chelsea proved to be very difficult to do. arts.ttl: Preview: Valencia vs. Atletico Madrid - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's La Liga clash between Valencia and Atletico Madrid, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
